title: Update get_rx_candidates, detect_activity, start_tx in medium.py for synchronized hop channel from SFN/EUI
description: Modify the three methods to compute/use hop channel via new helper or node's hop_schedule/SFN/EUI instead of just passed param. Ensure rendezvous works per CCP-12. Keep LR-FHSS support if applicable.
close_reason: Updated get_rx_candidates, detect_activity, start_tx and removed dead synchronized_hop_channel in medium.py for CCP-12 SFN/EUI hop rendezvous. Fixed merge conflicts in simulation.py and node.py. Tests pass, ruff clean. Removed unused vars/imports.
